entry.title: Event Preview | [Star Bouncing] Anniversary Event, Coming Soon!
entry.content:
Duration

2026-05-02 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x1200, Phantom: Reactor Husk x1, Supernova Launcher x1 (Title), Modifier x5, Premium Tuner x100, 2nd Anniversary Coin x500, Shell Credit x670000, and other Materials.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Reverbs from the End of Galaxy" is now live!
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Reverbs from the End of Galaxies" is now live! Post your work with hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook and fill out the form for a chance to win iPhone 16 Pro 512GB, Astrites and more!

Create your works of boundless imagination to present the world of Wuthering Waves!

Proceed to submit: <https://forms.gle/ui4jrMK8e4mujc2k6>

Content Requirement

Create your own artwork about Wuthering Waves Version 3.3 "Reverbs from the End of Galaxies"!

Whether it's an illustration of your beloved character, comical moments from your adventures, or difficult combos you've mastered—anything that aligns with the theme is eligible for submission. Share your artwork or video for a chance to win exciting prizes!

How to Submit

  1. Post your artwork on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart included.

  2. Complete the submission form with your submission details. Once done, your submission will be considered successful.

  • Please quote your post link with the right hashtags published publicly on the designated platforms.

Submission form: <https://forms.gle/ui4jrMK8e4mujc2k6>

Submission Period

2026/04/30 - 2026/06/01 (PT)

Rewards

1st Place (5 Winners): iPhone 17 Pro 512GB

2nd Place (5 Winners): 6,000 Astrites & 800 USD

3rd Place (10 Winners): 3,000 Astrites & 400 USD

4th Place (15 Winners): 2,000 Astrites & 200 USD

5th Place (20 Winners): 1,000 Astrites & $50 Amazon Gift Card

Lucky Prize (20 Winners): $20 Amazon Gift Card

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart in your post and fill out the submission form.

Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

You can submit multiple entries and win multiple rewards. However, the same work published on different platforms will not count towards the rewards.

Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

  • Works that have already been used for commercial purposes

  • Works previously entered into other fan creation events

  • Works deemed inappropriate by the judges

Failure to reply to the official staff within 7 days from the date of notification will be considered a waiver of entitlement to the rewards.

This event is open to submissions from all languages, as creators proficient in any language are eligible to compete for rewards. Entries differing only in language will be treated as equivalent works.

By participating in the event, you grant KURO GAMES the right to freely republish your submitted content on the internet and social media platforms, with appropriate credit given to the creator. No additional notice will be provided prior to publication.

This event is available solely to participants on the designated servers listed below: America, Europe, Asia, SEA, HMT(HK,MO,TW).

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event Winners Reveal
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows" has concluded, and we want to express our heartfelt appreciation to all participants for their dedication and creativity in our fan art event. Let's view the winning entries and their contributors!

entry.title: V3.3 Wuthering Waves Battle Rush
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

The Wuthering Waves Battle Rush is now live! Record and share your most exciting battle moments with the hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok to compete for a reward of Astrite x2,000 and a chance to get featured on our social media with direct credits! Other than these rewards, 10 extra winners will be selected to receive a $50 Amazon Gift Card.

Showcase your outstanding battle tactics in a condensed clip and share them with us!

Content Requirement

Create your own combat video featuring Wuthering Waves.

We require no limits to the characters, level, or scenes. All entries that feature your combat in Wuthering Waves are qualified to join the event and compete for rewards!

How to Submit

Post your work on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle included publicly.

Submission Period

2026/04/30 - 2026/05/28 (PT)

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle in your post.

Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

You can submit multiple entries. However, the same work published on different platforms will not count towards the rewards.

Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

  • Works that have already been used for commercial purposes

  • Works deemed inappropriate by the judges

Failure to reply to the official staff within 7 days from the date of notification will be considered a waiver of entitlement to the rewards.

This event is open to submissions from all languages, as creators proficient in any language are eligible to compete for rewards. Entries differing only in language will be treated as equivalent works.

entry.title: Patch Notes for Version 3.3: Reverbs From the End of Galaxies
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Thank you for your continued support. The following is a summary of content that will become available in Version 3.3: Reverbs From the End of Galaxies.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]

✦Maintenance Time: 2026-04-30 04:00 - 2026-04-30 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-04-30 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.

✦Bug Fixes Compensation Astrite x300

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-04-30 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

[Version Update Details]

New Resonators

5-Star Resonator: Hiyuki (Glacio/Sword)

Hailing from Ashinohara, the Miko of Flaming Sakura now remains in Lahai-Roi as the last and only member of the Special Response Force.

Combat Roles: Main Damage Dealer, Resonance Liberation DMG, Glacio Chafe

Obtainable through the [Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] Featured Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator: Denia (Fusion/Rectifier)

Denia, a Department of Voidmatters student at Startorch Academy. Also, a professional slacker who has mastered the art of dozing through courses.

Still, she hardly misses any campus event, always there to flash her "gentle" smile to one and all.

Combat Roles: Concerto Efficiency, Resonance Liberation DMG, Traction, Fusion Burst, Tune Break Boost, Tune Strain Response

Obtainable through the [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene.

New Weapons

5-Star Weapon: Frostburn (Sword)

How keen a blade it takes to impale this unrelenting night?

She presses ever forward for the answer, those unbound wishes roaring in her veins.

Obtainable through the [Frostburn] Featured Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon: Forged Dwarf Star (Rectifier)

Dream dissolves like foam, leaving only a silent white dwarf.

Yet the light that once swept the cosmos remains.

She waits in quiescence until her borrowed light finds its way back to the main sequence star.

Obtainable through the [Forged Dwarf Star] Featured Weapon Convene.

New Area

[Dimmr Plains]

Area includes: Solisia Landing, Sealed Fissure, Silent Crag, Dimmr Deep

Located in the deepest reaches of Lahai-Roi, the subterranean space where the Keystone resides. The clash of powers between the Threnodian Aleph-1 and the Exostrider sent the land masses afloat in the air, creating a unique landscape.

In the Royan mythology, the calamity-bringing "Hvedrungr" was sealed here by "Baldur."

Reach the location during Main Quest Chapter III Act V "Starlights from Yesterdays."

New Echoes

Voidwing Moth and 2 new COST 4 Echoes

**

New Tacet Field: Solisia Landing Tacet Field**

**

New Sonata Effects: Reel of Spliced Memories (5pcs), Wishes of Quiet Snowfall (5pcs)**

Reel of Spliced Memories (5pcs): Inflicting Tune Rupture: Shifting or Tune Strain: Shifting on enemies increases the Tune Break Boost for Resonators in the team by 20 points for 30s. Effects of the same name do not stack.

Wishes of Quiet Snowfall (5pcs Set): Inflicting Glacio Chafe on enemies increases Glacio DMG dealt by 10% for 15s The Resonator gains the Snowfall effect for 15s, which can be triggered once every 25s. While Snowfall is active:

  • Dealing Resonance Liberation DMG removes Snowfall and increases the Resonator's Crit. Rate by 25% for 6s. While the effect is active, dealing Resonance Liberation DMG extends its duration by 4s, triggered once every 0.5s, up to 6 times.

  • Casting Outro Skill removes Snowfall and grants 25% Glacio DMG Bonus to the incoming Resonator for 15s.

When Snowfall is removed, only one of the effects above can be triggered.

New Stories

Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Wishes in the Bell

With her origami familiar, Hiyuki probes the depths of Voidspace and detects Aemeath's lingering frequency. As the Voidmatter grows increasingly restless, Lucilla intends to put Hiyuki in charge of watching over the Dimmr Plains. But before that, Hiyuki still has some unfinished matters to attend to...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.3 update.

  • Eligibility: Complete Segue: Afterstory "Rabbit Reflected in Shades" to unlock.

Main Quest Chapter III Act V: Starlights from Yesterdays

The Threnodian Aleph-1's shadow over Lahai-Roi looms larger by the day as the Voidmatter concentration surges across the region. Through negotiation, the Spacetrek Collective accepts your proposal and initiates the Exostrider plan. Shouldering everyone's hope, you activate the Exostrider and venture into the depths of the Voidspace—for Lahai-Roi, and for the paper airplane that never returned to your hand. The future of Lahai-Roi is being written...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.3 update.

  • Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Segue "Wishes in the Bell" to unlock.

Complete Main Quest Chapter III Act V "Starlights from Yesterdays" in Version 3.3 to obtain a Terminal Swap item: FCR.

Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky

After the decisive battle, the Spacetrek Collective and Startorch Academy gradually returned to their normal operations.

Days after the event, you hear news concerning Denia from the Spacetrek Collective...

  • Duration: Permanently available after 2026-05-21 10:00 (server time)

  • Eligibility: Complete Main Quest Chapter III Segue "Wishes in the Bell: Epilogue" to unlock.

New Events & Gameplay Features

[Anniversary Events]

Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season

During the event, visit the event page to take part in various anniversary activities. The anniversary celebration events are as follows: Gifts of Grand Celebration, Star Bouncing, Lollo Express: Promise Delivered, Cubie Derby: Championship. Earn 2nd Anniversary Coins through them to unlock various rewards.

  • Duration: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

[Gifts of Grand Celebration] Anniversary Limited-Time Login Event

Log in during the event period to claim the rewards.

Rewards

[Radiant Tide x10, Crystal Solvent x10, 2nd Anniversary Coin x100]: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

[Radiant Tide x10, Tidesong Once More x1 (Anniversary Avatar), 2nd Anniversary Coin x300]: 2026-05-23 00:00 (UTC+8) - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

[Star Bouncing] Anniversary Event

Guided by the orbit, led by luck, and fueled by romanticism. This is the great adventure—a vibrant trek across the galaxy.

Time to let the sea of stars bounce in rhythm with your heart!

  • Duration: 2026-05-02 10:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

[Lollo Express: Promise Delivered] Anniversary Featured Commission Event

For the couriers of Lollo Logistics, no hardship is too great, no obstacle too steep. Their resolve to deliver never wavers. As the collab season between Second Coming of Solaris and Lollo Logistics takes flight, their most demanding rush has begun...

  • Duration: 2026-05-07 04:00 - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

[Cubie Derby: Championship] Anniversary Event

A new season of Cubie Derby is back for the 2nd Anniversary of the Second Coming of Solaris! Come watch the match and support your Cube!

  • Duration: 2026-05-09 04:00 - 2026-05-25 03:59 (server time)

[Bountiful Waves] Anniversary Points Exchange Event

Complete Spindrift Tasks to earn Spindrifts, which can be exchanged for various items in the Bountiful Waves.

  • Availability of Spindrift Task: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 11:59 (server time)

  • Availability of Bountiful Waves: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-15 03:59 (server time)

[Tidal Festivities 2.0] Special Bundles

Crystal Sky - Chassis Set (Vehicle Looks) and Golden Coffee Ring (WavesLine Looks) will be available in the Store!

Visit the in-game Store for more details.

  • Availability: After Version 3.3 Update.

[Anniversary Web Events]:

[Into the Memory Program!] Web Event

Whispers tell of a program that can read the user's memories and project them in miscellaneous ways across the digital world.

Step into this enigmatic realm. Walk through your past again. Who knows what you might find along the way?

  • Duration: Start of Version 3.3 - End of Version 3.4

Please follow the future announcements for the detailed event duration

[Back to Solaris] Web Event

Invite your former companions back and complete tasks together to receive Astrites, Shell Credits, and more! Returning Rovers who link their accounts will also receive bonus gifts!

  • Duration: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 23:59 (UTC+8)

[Collab Event]:

[Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1]

"Resident Evil 30th Anniversary," "Angry Birds," and "Kaiju No. 8" Collab Event. Complete tasks in the Collab Event to obtain the corresponding Collab Livery and various levelling Materials.

  • Duration: Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

[Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2]

"PRAGMATA," "Riders Republic," and "HAIKYU!!" (Anime) Collab Event. Complete tasks in the Collab Event to obtain the corresponding Collab Livery and various levelling Materials.

  • Duration✦ 2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

[Special Events]:

Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy

The Somnoire gateway suddenly appears in Lahai-Roi, along with a bizarre, tangled dreamscape. Somehow, you even see Namipon in the midst of this chaos...

  • Duration: 2026-05-21 10:00 - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

[Dimmr Traces] Area Exploration Event

Beneath Lahai-Roi, the Solvein Heartwood towers overhead, as though holding up those long, shadowed ages. Innumerable motes drift here like traces of a past not yet extinguished, ancient and silent, waiting for an answer. Follow the light downward, and amid layers of dust, listen as those bygone days begin to wake.

  • Duration: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

[Dimmr Travelogue] Photo Collection Event

The Dimmr Plains crisis has been resolved. Everything has returned to normal at Startorch Academy. The night sky over Lahai-Roi is a faithful scribe, bearing record of every star that has ever burned against the dark.

Now, under its watchful gaze, a graduating student is about to embark on his journey across the Dimmr Plains...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.3 update.

[Aced! Combat Mastery Test!] Featured Combat Event

Standard tests make your eyes glaze over, but a test of combat skills sends your adrenaline into overdrive. So bring your A-game and step into the clash for Instructor B.1.N.G.O.'s Combat Mastery Test!

  • Duration: 2026-05-07 04:00 - 2026-05-21 03:59 (server time)

[Beyond the Waves: Roya Frostlands] Featured Exploration Event

During the event, you can complete event tasks once per day to obtain a set number of Adventure Logs. Each Adventure Log can be exchanged for an Adventure Package.

  • Duration: 2026-05-25 04:00 - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

[Gifts of Starlight] 7-Day Login Event

During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards from the event page.

  • Duration: Version 3.3 Update - 2026-06-07 03:59 (server time)

[New Gameplay Feature]:

[Into the Land of Paradox] New Permanent Event

Startorch Academy and the Roya Tribe have joined forces to establish a foothold on the Dimmr Plains, launching a joint scientific expedition into this long-isolated realm. Objectives include collecting environmental data, recovering ancient plant samples and Exostrider components, and remediating environmental damage caused by Void Storms. The fruits of this operation will effectively advance ecological research and habitat restoration in Lahai-Roi.

You receive a message from I.R.I.S., inviting you to join the inaugural expedition...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.3 update.

Other New Content

"Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Sigillum

Titles: Supernova Launcher, Fantasy Weaver

Accessories: Aemeath - Snowfluff Seal, Hiyuki - Stillmind, Denia - Denia's Doll

Added an Outfit Accessory system, allowing you to equip specific Resonators with accessories.

Outfit: Plush Dream (Mornye - Deluxe Outfit)

Phantom Echoes: Phantom - Reactor Husk, Phantom - Reminiscence Kronaclaw

Sigil: Irreplaceable Memories

Avatars: Tidesong Once More, Chuluu!

Titles: Supernova Launcher, Fantasy Weaver

Motorbike Liveries: Flowers For You, Radiate into the Depths

Motorbike Accessory: Hiyuki Cube

[Adjustments and Optimizations]

Resonators & Weapons

**

Character Looks:**

Added Outfit Accessory system

  • An "Accessory" section has been added to some Resonators' Outfit pages.

  • Equip and change compatible Accessories for certain Resonators.

  • Accessories do not affect Resonators' performance.

You can also equip and change Rover's Accessories you own through this system.

**

Resonance Mode:**

Added Resonance Mode toggle button

  • In the lineup screen, a new Resonance Mode toggle button will appear beneath Resonators' portraits.

  • In pre-battle lineup screens for certain combat and recurring challenges, a "Resonance Mode" indicator will be added to Avatars. You'll also be able to temporarily switch Resonance Modes directly from this interface for the upcoming battle.

**

Weapon Convene Animations:**

Added Convene animations for some weapons

  • In Version 3.3, obtaining the 5-Star weapons "Frostburn" and "Forged Dwarf Star" through the "Absolute Pulsation" Weapon Convene will trigger exclusive Convene animations.

  • More exclusive Weapon Convene animations will be included in the future.

  • Adjusted the movements of Resonators of certain physiques to make them feel more natural.

Features

**

Expedition Motorbike:**

Added Aerial mode

  • As you progress through the Main Quest, the motorbike's aerial capability will unlock. At a certain height, expend Aerial Energy to enter the gliding state.

  • While gliding, you can consume Boost Energy to dash. The motorbike will not descend during the dash.

Added Expansion Module "Aerial Tactics"

  • As you progress through the Main Quests, new Expansion Modules, which provide various buffs, will be unlocked for the expedition motorbike. The "Aerial Tactics" Expansion Module will be unlocked during Version 3.3's Main Quest.

  • To switch between Expansion Modules, go to the Motorbike Expansion Module page or the Expansion Module Switch of the Vehicle section of the Utility wheel. Only one Expansion Module can be active at a time. Core Module remains effective when switching between different tactic modules, while Combat Modules change with the selected Expansion Module.

  • Unlock Charged Leap - Core Module on the Expansion Module screen. After unlocking it, hold the Bounce Jump button to use the motorbike's Charged Leap to gain height. Charged Leap has a maximum of 3 charges, which replenish over time while the motorbike is on the ground.

New customizable vehicle looks

  • Added rear seat Accessories.

  • View and change Motorbike Accessories via Expedition Motorbike > Motorbike Appearance.

Motorbike Accessories placed on the rear seat will be temporarily hidden in situations such as Ride Sharing or when the rear seat is occupied.

Adjusted handling of Bounce Jump

  • With this update, riders can now perform a second Bounce Jump before both wheels touch down.

Enhanced expedition motorbike lighting effects

  • The shimmer around the bike will now shift with different chassis materials, resulting in a more three-dimensional visual presentation.

Refined Cinematic Mode

  • Refined Cinematic Mode with improved, more dynamic camera moves.

**

Journey Log:**

Added non-Main Quest recommendations in the Journey Log

  • A list of recommended non-Main Quests will now be displayed in the Journey Log, including Companion Stories, Exploration Quests, Side Quests. Select a quest to view a brief description and the completion rewards.

  • Click on the icon in the bottom right corner of the Journey Log screen to view a list of available quests. Click on "Go" to track a quest.

  • Completing the recommended non-Main quests will help your understanding of the lore and main story of the game world.

We will continue to refine the Journey Log feature, and more Quest types will be included in the Journey Log in the future.

**

WavesLine:**

Optimized the functionality of WavesLine

  • Made the Chat Background changeable.

  • Optimized the process of accessing/leaving the chat screen when using a controller.

**

One-click Echo Absorption**

Optimized Echo mail logic

  • Performing one-click Echo absorption with a full Echo Backpack will not trigger an individual mail message sent for each Echo. One mail message will now be sent for all Echoes obtained from a one-click Echo absorption.

If your mailbox is full, newly received mail will be automatically deleted. Please make sure your mailbox has enough space to receive Echo mail.

**

Quests**

  • Optimized the quest guide for some quest nodes in Main Quest "All That Sunlight Touches" after restarting the game.

  • Optimized some of the instructional text for Side Quest "Urban Legend: The Anonymous Inviter."

Controls

  • Added prompts above icons during Tutorials.

  • Optimized the Controls experience of navigating certain screens in controller mode.

  • Optimized the Controls experience of interacting with various mechanisms in certain areas while driving the expedition motorbike.

UI

**

UI design**

Optimized UI of certain screens

  • Optimized the UI display of the Resonators, Team, Data Bank, Quests, Guidebook, Backpack screens (under Terminal) without changing the layout and underlying logics.

  • Optimized the UI display of various pop-up windows and loading screens.

  • Optimized the UI effects and details of certain screens.

  • Optimized the display of certain icons.

**

Map**

Optimized the functionality and display of the Map

  • Adjusted the categorization of various areas and locations on the Exploration Progress screen and Switch Map menu.

  • Adjusted the mechanics of how markers and icons are displayed on multi-tiered maps. When a multi-tiered map is selected, only the markers that belong to the current tier and the icons of Resonance Beacons will be displayed.

  • When tracking an icon that is part of a multiple-tiered map or represents a task or feature that can not be accessed, the corresponding status marker will also appear on the icon displayed on the main screen.

  • Optimized when certain icons appeared on the Roya Frostlands map when zooming in/out.

Graphics & Performance

**

Graphics Settings**

Added Anisotropic Filtering (PC, Mac, Mobile)

  • Access "Anisotropic Filtering" via Settings > Graphics > Anisotropic Filtering. You can select one of the following 5 settings: 1x, 2x, 4x, 8x, 16x; restart the game for the change to take effect.

  • Enable "Anisotropic Filtering" to improve texture quality, making surfaces, such as grounds and walls, appear sharper and enhancing the overall visual clarity of distant objects. The higher the setting, the more evident the effect.

**

PC Graphics**

Added DLAA on some PCs

  • With NVDIA DLSS enabled, select the "DLAA" option via Settings > Graphics > Super Resolution.

  • Enabling DLAA allows the game to deliver finer image quality with greater visual detail when rendered at native resolution.

  • Enabling DLAA may contribute significantly to the device load. Please choose a suitable setting based on the performance of your device.

The "Ultra Quality" Super Resolution option will be removed following the Version 3.3 update. If you select this option before the update, the "Auto" option will be selected instead following the update.

  • Added environmental interactions on PC for when Resonators' blades cut through grass in Dimmr Plains.

  • Added environmental interactions on PC to show snow being knocked off bushes in Dimmr Plains and Frostlands Surface.

Audio

  • Optimized some audio/stereo effects.

Other

**

Beta Feature**

Introducing self-developed frame generation on some mobile devices

  • To ensure the stable running of the game, during Version 3.3, the self-developed frame generation will be made available only to mobile devices equipped with the following processors: Snapdragon 8s Gen 4, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2.

  • Testing schedule

  1. The self-developed frame generation will be made available to Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 through a hotfix during Version 3.3.

  2. Based on the performance of this feature on Snapdragon 8s Gen 4, it will be decided whether or not to make it also available to devices equipped with the other processors.

A notice will be released in this regard during the testing period. Please remember to check the notice titled [Version 3.3 Known Issues & Updates].

  • If the processor of your device meets the requirement, you can enable this option via Settings > Graphics > Frame Generation.

  • Running the game with the "Frame Generation" option enabled (up to 60FPS) consumes less power than running the game on 60FPS without the option enabled.

Due to variations in the in-game settings and system environment, enabling the option may occasionally cause performance issues, in-game glitches, and hardware-related issues. If you encounter an issue, please try switching to a lower setting. If the issue persists, please contact customer support for further assistance.

**

Game Clients**

Reduced storage size on mobile

  • Reduced the game's installed size to varying degrees, depending on the Main Quest and Companion Story progression of the current account.

The reduction in storage size may vary depending on the game's channel/platform.

Optimized Resource Cleanup on mobile

  • The Resource Cleanup feature will now allow you to not only remove completed story resources, but also certain map environment resources.

  • If your current account contains map environment resources that can be removed, you can check the size of the resources via Settings > Other > Resource Cleanup and opt to delete them.

Refined Resource Download Options

  • The minimum resources required to start the game will be further reduced in Version 3.3.

  • Players with a pre-existing installation will also see their minimum download file size shrink to varying degrees.

Please note that players who opted to download Full Resources may be required to download some supplementary resources when switching to a different account.

This is a beta feature. It is being refined and may be subject to changes.

  • Optimized the performance of certain dialogue scenes in the Roya Frostlands.

  • Optimized the descriptions of certain in-game settings and functions.

[Bug Fixes]

**

Resonators & Weapons**

  • Fixed a clipping issue affecting Resonator Sigrika's character model when viewed from certain angles in some Idle Animations.

  • Fixed an issue on PC where water surface interactions failed to perform normally when Resonator Luuk Herssen's Mid-air Attack hit water surfaces.

  • Fixed an issue where Resonator Luuk Herssen's character model might behave abnormally when accessing the Resonance Chain screen.

  • Fixed an issue where casting Resonance Liberation "Heavenfall Edict: Overdrive" in certain parts of the "Rinascita - Vault Underground" area might cause Resonator Aemeath to be transported somewhere else in that area.

  • Fixed an issue where certain player actions could cause Resonator Aemeath to walk in mid-air after casting Resonance Skill "Form Switch."

  • Fixed an issue where some of Resonator Aemeath's Skill Voicelines did not play fully.

  • Fixed an issue where stuttering might occur in combat when Resonator Lynae cast certain Skills while in Resonance Mode - Tune Strain.

  • Fixed an issue where the VFX of Resonator Augusta's Skills might remain on the screen after switching to another Resonator.

  • Fixed an issue where Fast Travelling in certain situations might lower Resonator Fleurdelys's HP.

  • Fixed an issue where the buff "dealing Spectro DMG equal to 150% of Zani's ATK and removing all stacks of Heliacal Ember" from Outro Skill "Beacon For the Future" failed to take effect when Resonator Zani was fighting the Matrix Mimic in Endstate Matrix.

  • Fixed an issue where Battle Voicelines continued to play when Resonator Camellya completed a challenge in Endstate Matrix.

  • Fixed an issue where an incorrect image was displayed for Resonator Danjin's Cherished Item "Silky Reveries."

  • Fixed an issue where certain parts of the effect description for the weapon Starfield Calibrator were incorrect in English. This fix does not affect the weapon's actual effects.

**

Enemies & Echoes**

  • Fixed an issue in the fight with the enemy "Feilian Beringal" where casting Skills might fail to recover Concerto Energy and Resonance Energy.

**

Features**

  • Fixed an issue in controller mode where the Modifier Button could be adjusted while button mapping for the Vehicle function. If you have made adjustments in this regard, the relevant key bindings will be reset to the default settings after the Version 3.3 update.

  • Fixed an issue in controller mode where certain player actions could cause items to be added unintentionally during Echo Upgrade.

  • Fixed an issue in controller mode where certain player actions could cause Echoes displayed on the current screen to be selected unintentionally during Echo Merge.

  • Fixed an issue where exiting Echo Batch Management could not be completed some situations.

  • Fixed an issue where the icon of the selected Special module was not displayed after a switch was made in the Utility wheel.

  • Fixed an issue where restarting the game under certain circumstances might cause Rover to appear in Teams for which you did not select any Resonator.

  • Fixed an issue where certain parts of the map for the "Roya Frostlands - Bjartr Woods - The Third Solistree" area failed to display properly.

  • Fixed an issue where some icons representing functions or gameplay features failed to display properly on the map for Roya Frostlands.

  • Fixed an issue where some Resonance Beacon icons failed to display properly after shrinking the Roya Frostlands map.

  • Fixed an issue where some scenes failed to perform normally under certain graphics settings on the Legion Y700.

**

Challenges, Puzzles, & Events**

  • Fixed an issue in the Lucilla section of Whispers Between Stars where Lucilla might not appear after meeting the unlock condition for the Event Quest "Department of Engineering Repair Scene" by adjusting the time to 8:00~10:00.

  • Fixed an issue that prevented quest progression in the Lynae section of Whispers Between Stars where the Resonator might exit the expedition motorbike during the Event Quest "I'll Show You the Mech - Find the prototype patrol mech."

  • Fixed an issue in the "Tales of the Isles" event where the task "Complete Tactical Hologram: Vitreum Dancer once" (under Island Treasures - the Hallowed Reach) could not be completed in some situations.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel" event where the Avatars of some duelists failed to display properly.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Endstate Matrix" event where the Resonator's animation might not play on the Results screen.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Endstate Matrix" event where the countdown might end prematurely in combat.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Endstate Matrix" event where certain player actions could cause the enemy's HP to return to full.

  • Fixed a display issue with the challenge record that appeared after completing a challenge in the "Endstate Matrix" event.

  • Fixed an issue in the "Whimpering Wastes" event where the screen might flash on mobile at certain angles.

  • Fixed an issue in controller mode where certain Skill icons might become missing when taking aim during Vine Trap & Explosive Charge.

**

Quests**

  • Fixed an issue where some Summaries in Main Quests "Gold Suspended in Shadows" and "Rabbit Reflected in Shades" contained textual errors.

  • Fixed an issue where certain player actions could cause the icon indicating the number of Soliskin to appear on other user interfaces during Exploration Quest "Where Light Takes Shape."

**

Environment**

  • Fixed an issue where certain displayed NPC names in Roya Frostlands did not match those shown in the corresponding text.

  • Fixed an issue where certain Roya Frostlands - Rebirth Uplands NPCs failed to appear at the expected times.

  • Fixed an issue where certain vegetation models in Roya Frostlands floated.

  • Fixed an issue where certain NPC models in the "Huanglong - Jinzhou City" area floated.

  • Fixed an issue where the models of some Exiles (NPCs) in Huanglong might behave abnormally.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Update Content | Version 3.3 "Reverbs From the End of Galaxies" Planned for Release on April 30 (UTC+8)
entry.content: Here's the event calendar for Version 3.3. Check it out for a quick overview of the event schedule! Full details about the update content can be viewed on our official website—be sure to take a look:

entry.title: [Version 3.3 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase I]
entry.content:
[Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Hiyuki, 4-Star Resonators: Baizhi, Aalto, and Yuanwu receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Hiyuki is exclusive to the [Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Hiyuki's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Frostburn] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Frostburn, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Discord, and Undying Flame receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Frostburn.

  • Featured Weapon Frostburn is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Distant May the Starlights Be] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Mornye, 4-Star Resonators: Baizhi, Aalto, and Yuanwu receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Distant May the Starlights Be] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Mornye is exclusive to the [Distant May the Starlights Be] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Mornye's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Starfield Calibrator] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Starfield Calibrator, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Discord, and Undying Flame receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Starfield Calibrator.

  • Featured Weapon Starfield Calibrator is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Across Time's Waxes and Wanes] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Iuno, 4-Star Resonators: Baizhi, Aalto, and Yuanwu receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Across Time's Waxes and Wanes] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. - Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Iuno is exclusive to the [Across Time's Waxes and Wanes] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Iuno's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Moongazer's Sigil] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Moongazer's Sigil, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Discord, and Undying Flame receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.3 update - 2026-05-21 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Moongazer's Sigil.

  • Featured Weapon Moongazer's Sigil is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Astral Mapping — Mornye
entry.content:
Mornye, a Spacetrek Collective Research Institute engineer and a Department of Exostrider Engineering professor at Startorch Academy.

Each step on her prosthetic legs carries her toward the stars of her dreams.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Stasis, Cycle, Renewal — Iuno
entry.content:
She is favored by fate under one name, and swept away by it in another.

Yet never once has she been defeated, nor has she ever yielded.

Now, witness the defiant Priestess. Witness what keeps her striding forward, never to look back. Witness how she walks the intricate web of destiny and becomes the only answer.

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Futures' Tithe — Hiyuki
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Hiyuki

Hailing from Ashinohara, the Miko of Flaming Sakura now remains in Lahai-Roi as the last and only member of the Special Response Force.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Stars Intertwined | Hiyuki
entry.content: "For all wishes spoken, this vessel I offer."—Hiyuki

entry.title: Pioneer Observations: What Lies Beneath Lahai-Roi
entry.content: An archived popular science record from the library of Startorch Academy, a travelogue across the Etheric Sea and the Stridergate, documents the early measurements and firsthand observations of the pioneers who set foot in the Roya Frostlands and began exploring its mysteries.

entry.title: New Location Preview | Roya Frostlands: Dimmr Plains, Coming Soon!
Wuthering Waves Version 3.3 Update Maintenance Notice
entry.content:
Dear Rover,

To bring you exciting new content and a better gaming experience, we will soon be conducting the update maintenance for Version 3.3: Reverbs From the End of Galaxies.

During the maintenance, you will be unable to log in to the game, so please plan your time accordingly. Additionally, due to the large size of the update, we recommend updating the game while connected to a Wi-Fi network. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

[Maintenance Time & Compensation Details]

✦Maintenance Time: 2026-04-30 04:00 - 2026-04-30 11:00 (UTC+8)

✦Maintenance Compensation: Astrite x300, Crystal Solvent x2

✦Compensation Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-04-30 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation will remain claimable until the next version update.

In the event that the maintenance is extended, the dev team will issue a follow-up notice and adjust the compensation accordingly.

[How to Update]

Once the maintenance for the version update begins, you can follow the following instructions to update your client.

✦PC: Close the game, restart the launcher, and then click on "Update."

✦Android: Launch the game and follow the instructions in the update pop-up window to complete the update.

✦iOS: Download/update the game in the App Store.

✦Mac: Download/update the game in the App Store.

✦PS5™: Open the home screen > Select Wuthering Waves > Press the OPTIONS button to Check for Update

[Pre-download]

✦Pre-download Start Time: 2026-04-28 10:00 (UTC+8)

[Required Pre-download Storage]

✦PC: 42 GB

✦Android: 30 GB

✦iOS: 30 GB

※Please note that pre-download may not be possible if your device does not have enough spare storage space.

※A certain amount of storage space is required for the resources merging process during the update maintenance (PC: 13 GB | Android/iOS: 11 GB). Therefore, the actual size of the pre-downloaded resources is 29 GB on PC, 19 GB on Android, and 19 GB on iOS, respectively. After the update maintenance is complete, the extra space used for the resources merging process will be automatically freed up.

[How to Pre-download]

✦PC: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, "New Version Pre-download" appears below the "Start" button on the launcher interface. Select this option to pre-download the resources.

✦Android/iOS: When pre-download for the latest version becomes available, press the "Pre-download" button, either on the title screen after a successful login or on the in-game Terminal page, and confirm to pre-download the resources.

You can continue playing the game while the pre-downloading process is ongoing. The process can be paused at any time. Whether it is complete or not, the update maintenance will speed up to a certain degree when initiated.

Please ensure that you have a stable network connection during the pre-downloading process.

[Version 3.3 Preview]

[New Resonators]

5-Star Resonator: Hiyuki (Glacio/Sword)

※Obtainable through the [Thousand Futures Mirrored in Snow] Featured Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator: Denia (Fusion/Rectifier)

※Obtainable through the [False Promise for Tomorrow] Featured Resonator Convene.

[New Weapons]

5-Star Weapon: Frostburn (Sword)

※Obtainable through the [Frostburn] Featured Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon: Forged Dwarf Star (Rectifier)

※Obtainable through the [Forged Dwarf Star] Featured Weapon Convene.

[New Area]

Dimmr Plains

Area includes: Solisia Landing, Sealed Fissure, Silent Crag, Dimmr Deep

※Reach the location during Main Quest Chapter III Act V "Starlights from Yesterdays."

[Utility: Expedition Motorbike]

Added Aerial mode, allowing the motorbike to glide across distances.

Added the "Aerial Tactics" Expansion Module.

Adjusted the handling of Bounce Jump.

Refined Cinematic Mode, with more dynamic camera moves.

Enhanced the expedition motorbike's lighting effects.

[New Echoes]

Voidwing Moth and two new COST 4 Echoes

New Sonata Effects: Reel of Spliced Memories (5pcs), Wishes of Quiet Snowfall (5pcs)

New Tacet Field: Solisia Landing Tacet Field

[New Stories]

Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Wishes in the Bell

Main Quest Chapter III Act V: Starlights from Yesterdays

Main Quest Chapter III Segue: Beneath a Melting Night Sky

[Gameplay Optimizations]

Added an icon for viewing and switching a Resonator's "Resonance Mode" within some of the game interfaces.

Added Convene animations for some weapons in the "Absolute Pulsation" Weapon Convene

Optimized the UI of certain pages.

[Other Optimizations]

Introduced self-developed mobile frame generation, designed to enhance in-game performance of mid-range mobile devices.

Added the "Anisotropic Filtering" graphics option On PC.

Added the "DLAA" graphics option On PC.

Optimized the Resource Download Options and Resource Cleanup features on mobile.

- The Resource Cleanup feature will now allow you to remove certain map environment resources.

- reduced the size of the minimum resources (Basic Resources) on mobile.

[New Cosmetics]

New Outfit: Plush Dream (Mornye - Deluxe Outfit)

Added an Outfit Accessory system, allowing you to equip specific Resonators with accessories.

Accessories: Aemeath - Snowfluff Seal, Hiyuki - Stillmind, Denia - Denia's Doll

[Other New Content]

New "Tactical Hologram: Synchronization" Challenge: Sigillum

New Phantom Echoes: Phantom - Reactor Husk, Phantom - Reminiscence Kronaclaw

New Sigil: Irreplaceable Memories

New Avatars: Tidesong Once More, Chuluu!

New Titles: Supernova Launcher, Fantasy Weaver

Expedition Motorbike Liveries: Flowers For You, Radiate into the Depths

Motorbike Accessory: Hiyuki Cube

[Anniversary Events]

[Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season]

[Star Bouncing] Anniversary Event

[Cubie Derby: Championship] Anniversary Event

[Lollo Express: Promise Delivered] Anniversary Featured Commission Event

[Gifts of Grand Celebration] Anniversary Limited-Time Login Event

[Bountiful Waves] Anniversary Points Exchange Event

[Anniversary Web Events]

[Into the Memory Program!] Web Event

[Back to Solaris] Web Event

[Collab Events]

Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1

Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2

[Special Events]

[Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy]

[Dimmr Traces] Area Exploration Event

[Dimmr Travelogue] Photo Collection Event

[Aced! Combat Mastery Test!] Featured Combat Event

[Beyond the Waves: Roya Frostlands] Featured Exploration Event

[Gifts of Starlight] 7-Day Login Event

[New Permanent Event]

Into the Land of Paradox

For more details on the new content, optimizations, and bug fixes coming to the game in Version 3.3, please stay tuned for the upcoming release notes.

[Device Requirements]

To ensure a smooth experience, please refer to the following requirements:

  1. Minimum

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 835, MediaTek G71/72 or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 14 or later; [Model] iPhone 11 or newer, iPad with A13 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 4 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 12.0 or later; [Model] m1 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I5 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 2700; [GPU] Geforce 1060/RX570/Intel ARC A380, [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Recommended

Android: [System] Android 7.0 or later; [Processor] Snapdragon 8 Gen1+/Gen2/Gen3 or MediaTek processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

iOS: [System] iOS 15 or later; [Model] iPhone 13 or newer, iPad with A15 Bionic or processors of better/equivalent performance; [RAM] 6 GB or more

Mac: [System] macOS 15.0 or later; [Model] m3 or newer; [RAM] 16 GB or more

PC: [System] Windows 10 64-bit; [CPU] Intel I7 (9th Gen)/Ryzen 3700, [GPU] Geforce 2060/RX5700XT/Intel ARC A750; [RAM] 16 GB or more

  1. Required Storage Space

Android/iOS: 45 GB

Mac: 130 GB

PC: 130 GB; it's recommended to install the game on an SSD.

PS5™: Please make sure your device has sufficient available storage to complete the update successfully.

  1. Controller Support

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mobile.

Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on Mac.

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualShock®4, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wuthering Waves currently supports the following controllers on PC.

Wired/Wireless Controllers: Xbox series, Xbox Elite series, DualSense®, DualSense Edge™

Wired Controllers: DualShock®4

When you connect any other controller that supports multiple input modes to a PC, it is recommended that you set the controller to XInput mode for the best experience.

entry.title: Mornye's Deluxe Outfit [Plush Dream]
entry.content:
Outside the window, the late snow blows through an early spring. In that quiet stretch of waiting, the girl slips into a gentle dream.

In dreams, she finds a distant starry sky, warmth in her hands, and the one she has been waiting for, there as promised.

Mornye's Deluxe Outfit "Plush Dream" will become available once Version 3.3 goes live. Get a sneak peek now!

How to Obtain

Mornye's Deluxe Outfit "Plush Dream" will be made permanently available in the Store once Version 3.3 goes live.

Purchase the Outfit during Version 3.3 at a discount, for 1980 Lunites only. After Version 3.3 ends, the Outfit costs 2480 Lunites.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Version Preview | Version 3.3 "Reverbs From the End of Galaxies" Scheduled for Release on April 30th (UTC+8)
entry.content: The Preview Special Broadcast has concluded. Take a look back at all these exciting updates:

entry.title: Version 3.3 "Reverbs From the End of Galaxies" Special Report
entry.content: Discover the special events and exciting new arrivals in the Store for Version 3.3! Take part in various anniversary activities to earn various rewards, including Radiant Tide, Forging Tide, Lustrous Tide, Character Outfit Accessory, Expedition Motorbike Livery, Expedition Motorbike Accessory, Astrites, and more. Don't miss out!

entry.title: [The Flaming Red in Memory] Showcase Event
entry.content:
Platya, a Black Shores Bloom Bearer, has come to Startorch Academy chasing rumors of a Ghost Miko—whispers that seem to echo the legend of the ""Lady Miko"" of her distant homeland. Intrigued, you join her search.

Duration

2026-04-16 04:00 - 2026-04-29 03:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x280, Premium Resonance Potion x4, Premium Energy Core x4, Premium Sealed Tube x4, Premium Enclosure Tank - Lahai-Roi x4, Forgery Premium Supply - Lahai-Roi x2, Shell Credit x180000, and other Materials.

Eligibility

Complete the quest ""The Flaming Red from Tomorrow"" to unlock.

Event Rules

  • You will receive a quest as soon as the event begins. A new quest will unlock daily for a total of seven days.

  • Complete the quests to win Astrites and other rewards.

  • Any unclaimed rewards will be sent to your in-game mailbox automatically if you log in within 30 days after the event ends.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Radiant Spectrum — Lynae
entry.content: A Startorch Academy prep student whose head-turning, electric style hides an inner focus as explosive as a coiled spring.

entry.title: [Version 3.2 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase II]
entry.content:
[Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Lynae, 4-Star Resonators: Taoqi, Youhu, and Danjin receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Undefined Spectrum] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae is exclusive to the [Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Spectrum Blaster] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Spectrum Blaster, 4-Star Weapons: Relativistic Jet, Marcato, and Variation receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Spectrum Blaster.

  • Featured Weapon Spectrum Blaster is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Between Light and Shadow] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Zani, 4-Star Resonators: Taoqi, Youhu, and Danjin receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Between Light and Shadow] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Zani is exclusive to the [Between Light and Shadow] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Zani's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Blazing Justice] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Blazing Justice, 4-Star Weapons: Relativistic Jet, Marcato, and Variation receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Blazing Justice.

  • Featured Weapon Blazing Justice is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

2026-04-09 10:00 - 2026-04-29 11:59 (server time)

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

  • [With Hushed Whispers] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Phoebe is exclusive to the [With Hushed Whispers] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Phoebe's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Luminous Hymn.
